---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is not working as documented
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Include which module or feature is affected (e.g. rule engine, ML model, heatmap, dashboard rendering).

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open `index.html` served via `npx serve . -p 3000`
2. Hover over '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include console errors if any (open DevTools → Console).

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.12.0 (for test runner bugs) |
| Dev server used | e.g. `npx serve`, `python3 -m http.server`, live-server |

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or console logs.
